details.test: Task 1: Book highest-rated family chalet with free breakfast under $220/night
Task 2: Reserve cheapest conference room for 50 people with projector (full-day)
Task 3: Weekend retreat booking with 3 highly rated chalets under $1,800 total
Task 4: Choose romantic weekend package with latest checkout time for 2 adults
Task 5: Book midweek 3-night chalet stay in November with WINTER20 promo
Task 6: Configure full-day conference with main hall, two breakouts, and vegetarian buffet lunch
Task 7: Switch to EUR and book chalet with hot tub under chosen nightly rate
Task 8: Add three chalets to favorites, pick best by rating then price, and start booking
Task 9: Submit wedding quote request for 120 guests with budget and menu preference
